texto: It takes time to see the desert; you have to keep looking at it. When you've looked long neough, you realise the blank wastes of sand and rock are teemming with life. Just as you can keep looking at a person and suddenly realise that the way you see them has completely changed: from being a stranger, they've gradually revealed themselves as someone with a wealth of complexities and surprising subtleties that you're growing to love.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Annie Caulfield sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. A afirmação “It takes time to see the desert; you have to keep looking at it. When you've looked long neough, …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a motivacao, inspiracional, travel, útil em momentos de mudanca e viagem.
